title: Chunkium
description: This Modpack Aims To Provide You With 100 Chunk Render Distance Without Causing Lag
body:
This modpack is designed to push Minecraft's render distance to the next level—literally! Inspired by Distant Horizons, this pack allows you to extend your view by 100+ chunks without the usual lag and performance drops. Whether you're exploring vast landscapes, spotting distant structures, or simply enjoying the beauty of Minecraft’s world, this modpack hopefully ensures a smooth, high-performance experience even at extreme distances.

( We Hope We Are Still Working Out The Kinks)
